title: Privacy Policy
intro: We take data protection seriously. This policy explains how we collect and use personal data.

sections.title: Data we collect
items: Account data (name, email, profile details).
Contact form messages and related metadata.
Newsletter subscription data (email address).
Technical data such as logs and device information.

sections.title: Purposes
items: Create and manage user accounts.
Respond to requests and provide support.
Send newsletters with your consent.
Improve the service and ensure security.

sections.title: Legal bases
items: Contract performance for account services.
Consent for newsletters and optional communications.
Legitimate interest for security and service improvement.

sections.title: Retention
items: Data is kept for the duration of the relationship.
Contact data is kept up to 3 years after the last interaction.

sections.title: Your rights
items: Access, rectification, erasure, and restriction.
Objection and data portability.
Withdraw consent at any time.

sections.title: Contact
items: For privacy requests, contact: contact@weebbackend.melissa-mangione.com.

sections.title: Cookies
items: We use necessary cookies for site operation.
Optional cookies are only set with your consent.

sections.title: User information
items: When you leave feedback on the platform, we may automatically analyze the content of your message to derive a satisfaction indicator (positive, negative, or neutral) and a confidence score.
This analysis is used solely to improve the quality of the service and training courses by helping us identify feedback that should be handled first.
Your feedback text is not used to build a broader profile about you, and no decision producing legal or similarly significant effects is made solely on the basis of this processing.
The results (class and confidence) are stored with your feedback and are deleted if your account is deleted.
Depending on the configuration, a translation step may be used before the analysis; in that case, the text is transmitted only for the purpose of enabling this processing.
You can exercise your rights (access, export, deletion) through the features available in your account.
